description_long: This object is a set of five axes, each featuring a robust, single-edged blade with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard. The blades are mounted on wooden handles that are gently curved for ergonomic grip, with visible color variations suggesting different finishes or materials. The handles appear to be reinforced at the head, where the blade is securely attached, likely using a traditional wedged mounting style. The axes display a utilitarian design, with no visible decorative engravings or branding, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The blades are metallic, with a matte or slightly rough finish, and the handles show subtle textural details indicative of wood grain. These axes are typical of those found in urban garages, workshops, or maintenance sheds, suitable for chopping wood or general utility tasks.
description: A set of five axes with broad, single-edged metal blades and curved wooden handles, each finished in different colors. The design is functional and robust, with no visible branding or decorative markings.
description_view_0: The axes are viewed edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blades and handles, making them appear as narrow vertical lines.
description_view_1: The axes are seen from the side, clearly displaying the full shape of the blades and the curvature of the handles, with distinct color differences among the five axes.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the axes are seen edge-on from the opposite side, again appearing as thin vertical lines with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The axes are shown from the opposite side compared to view 1, revealing the other face of the blades and handles, with the same color and design variations.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, ergonomic grip, and oval cross-section; each handle is slightly different in color.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad blade with a curved cutting edge and pronounced beard; no visible decorative features, functional geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, with the blade fitted onto the handle and secured at the head.
